generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components //
instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures real-time position coordinates (X, Y, Z axes) of the gantry crane's pucks/containers using embedded encoders or inertial measurement units."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Tracks velocity profiles of crane movements along kinematic axes, providing real-time velocity data for trajectory validation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneLoadSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors load status and weight distribution of transported containers via force/torque sensors integrated into the crane's lifting mechanism."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneLoadDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneAccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Records acceleration data along kinematic axes to support dynamic modeling and vibration analysis of the crane system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance CranePositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance CraneVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneVelocitySensor
]

instance CraneLoadDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneLoadSensor
]

instance CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneAccelerationSensor
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor, CraneVelocitySensor, CraneLoadSensor, CraneAccelerationSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Parametric CAD-based kinematic model of the gantry crane's degrees of freedom (DoF) generated using FreeCAD/Blender, supporting real-time kinematic updates via sensor feedback."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FreeCADEnabler, KinematicSolverEnabler, GazeboEnabler
]

instance PhysicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Gazebo-based physics simulation model emulating the crane's dynamic behavior for offline validation and multi-physics co-simulation with control strategies."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GazeboEnabler, ROSEnabler
]

instance ControlAlgorithmModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Optimal control algorithm (e.g., MPC, PID) implemented in Python/SciPy for real-time trajectory planning and adaptive control parameter adjustment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonControlEnabler, MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured time-series data containing timestamped position coordinates (X, Y, Z) of the crane's pucks/containers for validation and visualization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, ThreeJSVisualizationEnabler
]

instance CraneVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series velocity data capturing crane movement profiles along kinematic axes for trajectory analysis and control validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance CraneLoadData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured load data including weight measurements and distribution metrics for operational monitoring and safety validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneLoadDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, FaultDetectionService
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time state data combining position, velocity, load, and acceleration metrics for comprehensive system validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, OptimalControlService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance FreeCADEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source CAD tool used for parametric modeling of the gantry crane's geometry and kinematic chains, enabling real-time geometry updates."
    DTDFVocab:enables KinematicModelingService, VisualizationService
]

instance BlenderEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D modeling tool for creating detailed crane visualizations and animations used in the digital twin's visualization layer."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance KinematicSolverEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based kinematic solver using NumPy/SciPy to compute joint trajectories and inverse dynamics for real-time kinematic updates."
    DTDFVocab:enables KinematicSimulationService, OptimalControlService
]

instance ROSEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System framework enabling real-time simulation, hardware-in-the-loop testing, and bidirectional communication between physical and digital components."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, ControlService
]

instance GazeboEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS-compatible physics simulator for emulating the crane's dynamic behavior, supporting offline validation and multi-physics co-simulation."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing structured sensor logs and operational data with high-resolution timestamps for analysis and validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight IoT message broker enabling high-throughput data streaming between physical crane and digital twin components via publish/subscribe model."
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalToVirtualInteractionService, DataManagementService
]

instance PythonControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based control system development environment using SciPy and Control Systems Toolbox for optimal control algorithm implementation."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance MatlabSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model predictive control (MPC) implementation environment for advanced control strategy development and deployment."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance ThreeJSVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web-based 3D visualization framework for rendering synchronized animations of the crane's state with real-time position updates."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance DashDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard framework (Plotly/Dash) for displaying real-time metrics, alerts, and operational status of the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Machine learning-based fault detection system using scikit-learn/TensorFlow to analyze digital twin residuals for anomaly detection."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

// C6: Services
instance KinematicModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates and maintains parametric kinematic models of the crane's degrees of freedom using FreeCAD/Blender for simulation and visualization."
    DTDFVocab:provides KinematicModelInsight
]

instance KinematicSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes real-time kinematic simulations using the digital twin model to validate physical movements against sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides KinematicValidationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides Gazebo-based physics simulation for offline validation and co-simulation with control strategies to test operational scenarios."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously logs operational data (position, velocity, load) to TimescaleDB for historical analysis and longitudinal validation."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataAnalysisInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Deploys real-time control policies (MPC/PID) to the physical crane via ROS action servers, dynamically adjusting parameters based on digital twin feedback."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Renders synchronized 3D animations of the crane's state with real-time sensor data overlays for intuitive monitoring and debugging."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares digital twin predictions with physical measurements using distance metrics to detect deviations and trigger alerts for system validation."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertAction
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time dashboards displaying operational metrics, system health, and performance indicators for operators."
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements statistical process control and machine learning models to detect faults based on digital twin residuals and sensor anomalies."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultAlertAction
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides control interfaces for deploying real-time control policies to the physical crane system."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlOptimizationAction
]

instance DataManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages data storage, retrieval, and synchronization between physical sensors and digital twin components."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataAnalysisInsight
]

instance PhysicalToVirtualInteractionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Handles bidirectional data exchange between physical crane components and digital twin models."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertAction
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements adaptive control algorithms that adjust parameters based on real-time system feedback."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlOptimizationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance KinematicModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides parametric model accuracy metrics and kinematic chain validation results for the digital twin's fidelity assessment."
]

instance KinematicValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantifies kinematic error between simulated and physical trajectories, enabling real-time adjustment of the digital twin model."
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Delivers validation metrics from Gazebo simulations comparing predicted vs. actual physical behavior under various operational scenarios."
]

instance DataAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generates performance analytics from historical data including operational patterns, efficiency metrics, and anomaly detection reports."
]

instance ControlOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts crane motion parameters (acceleration, jerk) in real-time to optimize energy consumption or precision based on digital twin feedback."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides synchronized 3D visualizations of the crane's state with real-time sensor data overlays for intuitive system monitoring."
]

instance ValidationAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers visual/audio alerts when kinematic discrepancies exceed predefined thresholds, indicating potential system drift or faults."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Displays real-time operational metrics including system health, performance indicators, and environmental conditions via interactive dashboards."
]

instance FaultAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activates automated fault detection mechanisms using statistical process control and machine learning to identify and report system anomalies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: System Under Study
instance LabScaleGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane cyber-physical system designed for digital twin validation, fault detection, and control optimization research."
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment
]

instance CraneMechanicalStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical gantry crane with kinematic capabilities for movement along X, Y, and Z axes, serving as the primary system under study for digital twinning."
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment
]

instance CraneEmbeddedController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Embedded control system interfacing with crane actuators and sensors to enable real-time operation and feedback for bidirectional digital twin interaction."
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CraneMechanicalStructure, CraneEmbeddedController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "
The **Virtual-to-Physical Interaction** is facilitated by the **Control Application**, which generates and transmits **control commands** to the **Physical Crane Interface** to execute trajectories. Command types include **optimal movement trajectories** (generated by the **Trajectory Generator Service**) designed to eliminate residual swinging motion at the end of movements. The **control message format** is not explicitly detailed, but the system implies structured JSON or protocol buffers (common in Python-based systems) for inter-service communication via the **MQTT Broker**.

**Validation and authentication mechanisms** are not explicitly described, but the **Continuous Validation Service** ensures command execution fidelity by comparing simulated (virtual) and executed (physical) trajectories. **Feedback systems** are embedded in the **Logging Application**, which continuously monitors crane state, and the **Dashboard** provides real-time visualization for operator intervention. **Conflict resolution** is not detailed, but the **Continuous Validation Service** acts as a safeguard by alerting operators via the **Dashboard** if trajectory deviations exceed thresholds. **Command execution confirmation** is implied through the validation service’s comparison logic, though explicit acknowledgment protocols (e.g., MQTT QoS levels or handshake mechanisms) are not mentioned.
"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems in the documents employ **ad-hoc orchestration patterns** rather than standardized digital twin frameworks. **GreenhouseDT** uses **InfluxDB** for time-series data storage, **ActiveMQ** for message brokering, and **virtual machines (VMs)** with pre-recorded data to facilitate synchronization between the physical greenhouse and its digital twin. The system relies on **containerization or virtualization** for deployment, with **no explicit mention of orchestration frameworks** (e.g., Kubernetes, Docker Swarm). **Air Quality Management** leverages **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling, integrates with **Raspberry Pi sensors**, and employs **Microsoft Azure tools** for pipeline implementation, including runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction. The system lacks detailed descriptions of **component integration patterns** or **resource management strategies**, but the use of **Azure** suggests cloud-based orchestration. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system is described using the **C4 Model**, implying a **containerized microservices architecture** with potential for **decentralized coordination** via container orchestration (e.g., Docker/Kubernetes), though no specific tools or patterns are mentioned. Overall, the systems exhibit **loose coupling** between physical and digital components, with **no formalized constellation patterns** beyond ad-hoc toolchains."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The provided documents do not explicitly detail lifecycle stages (e.g., design, deployment, operation, retirement) for any of the Digital Twin systems. However, the **GreenhouseDT** exemplar implies a lifecycle involving:
  - **Development**: Behavioral adaptation of both the physical greenhouse and its digital twin, with prerecorded data in virtual machine images for easy deployment.
  - **Deployment**: Use of **InfluxDB** for time-series data storage and **ActiveMQ** for message brokerage, enabling real-time synchronization between the physical and digital systems.
  - **Operation**: Self-adaptive mechanisms for both the greenhouse and its digital twin, though lifecycle governance (e.g., versioning, compliance, or retirement protocols) is not specified.
  The **Air Quality Management** exemplar focuses on runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction, suggesting lifecycle phases centered around **runtime adaptation** (e.g., sensor data ingestion via Raspberry Pi) and **simulation-driven decision support** (e.g., virus spread prediction). No explicit governance or transition management is documented.
  The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system is described using the **C4 Model** for architecture visualization but lacks lifecycle stage details beyond architectural decomposition. **Not in Document** for standardized lifecycle governance frameworks (e.g., ISO/IEC 42010 or IEEE 1471)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "
The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar emphasizes **self-adaptive behavioral alignment** between the physical greenhouse and its digital twin, implying dynamic validation mechanisms. However, explicit **validation/verification methods**, **uncertainty quantification**, or **error correction mechanisms** are not detailed. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar focuses on **model-driven engineering** for runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction, suggesting fidelity is ensured through **AutomationML-based model consistency**, but no specific validation protocols (e.g., statistical testing, uncertainty bounds) are mentioned. The **Gantry Crane** exemplar does not address fidelity or validity considerations in the provided documents.
"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin’s Technical Connection** relies on a **hybrid network architecture** integrating the **Physical Crane** (hardware layer) with digital services via the **MQTT Broker** (message broker) and **TimescaleDB** (time-series database). The **communication protocols** include:
1. **MQTT** for inter-service signaling (e.g., trajectory commands, sensor data, validation alerts) between containers like the **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, and **Continuous Validation Service**.
2. **Custom Python interfaces** for direct hardware control (e.g., **Physical Crane Interface** communicating with crane controllers).

**Network topology** is not explicitly detailed, but the system implies a **centralized broker-based topology** (MQTT) with potential **point-to-point connections** for critical services (e.g., Control Application ↔ Physical Crane Interface). **Bandwidth and latency requirements** are inferred to be moderate, given the real-time nature of trajectory generation and validation, though exact specifications (e.g., <100ms latency) are absent. **Reliability and redundancy mechanisms** are not described, but the **Continuous Validation Service** ensures operational resilience by detecting and alerting on deviations. **Security protocols** are not mentioned, though MQTT typically supports TLS for encrypted communication.
"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin’s Hosting and Deployment** infrastructure is **on-premise** (implied by the lack of cloud/edge references) and consists of **five physical containers** (hardware) and **six digital containers** (software services). **Computational requirements** are not quantified, but the system includes:
- A **TimescaleDB** instance for time-series data storage (scalable for high-frequency logging).
- **Grafana Dashboard** for real-time visualization (lightweight but requires moderate compute).
- **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, and **Continuous Validation Service** (likely running on a single or shared compute node with Python dependencies).

**Scalability mechanisms** are not explicitly detailed, but the modular C4 architecture suggests potential horizontal scaling for services (e.g., multiple instances of the **Trajectory Generator Service**). **Deployment models** include:
1. **Monolithic deployment** (all services co-located on a single machine, given the lack of containerization references beyond the C4 model abstraction).
2. **Service-oriented deployment** (each container as a separate process or lightweight container, though not Docker-based).

**Availability/reliability assurance** is ensured via the **Continuous Validation Service**, which monitors system health and triggers alerts. No redundancy or failover protocols (e.g., load balancing, backup databases) are mentioned.
"
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar integrates with **InfluxDB** (time-series database) and **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for data exchange, relying on **RESTful APIs** or **MQTT-like protocols** (implied by message brokering) for sensor-actuator communication. No explicit interoperability standards (e.g., OPC UA, IIoT protocols) are mentioned, and dependencies are limited to **virtual machines and containerized environments**. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar integrates **Raspberry Pi sensors** with **AutomationML-based digital twins** and **Microsoft Azure** for cloud processing, utilizing **Azure IoT Hub** or similar services for data ingestion. The system adheres to **AutomationML** (ISO 15926-2) for digital twin modeling but lacks details on **enterprise system integration** (e.g., ERP, MES). The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system is not described in sufficient detail for horizontal integration, but the **C4 Model** suggests potential integration with **external control systems** or **logistics platforms** via **APIs or message queues**. None of the systems explicitly mention **interoperability with other Digital Twins** or **enterprise systems** beyond their primary use cases."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The provided documents indicate **limited adherence to standardization** across the exemplars:
  - **GreenhouseDT**:
    - **Technologies**: Uses **InfluxDB** (time-series database standard) and **ActiveMQ** (JMS-compliant message broker), which are industry-recognized but not part of Digital Twin-specific standards.
    - **Interoperability**: No mention of **OPC UA**, **ROS 2**, or other Digital Twin interoperability standards; dissemination relies on **ad-hoc containerization/virtualization** (e.g., VM images).
    - **Certification**: No compliance frameworks (e.g., ISO/IEC 15926) or certification requirements are referenced.
  - **Air Quality Management**:
    - **Technologies**: Employs **AutomationML** (ISO 15930-compliant) for digital twin representation and **Microsoft Azure** (cloud platform with Digital Twin-specific services like Azure Digital Twins).
    - **Interoperability**: No explicit mention of cross-domain interoperability standards (e.g., OPC UA for IoT); relies on **Raspberry Pi sensors** and **Azure tools** for domain-specific integration.
    - **Certification**: No compliance frameworks or certification requirements are documented.
  - **Lab Scale Gantry Crane**:
    - **Architecture**: Uses the **C4 Model** (software architecture standard) for visualization but lacks Digital Twin-specific standardization (e.g., no mention of **ISO/IEC 42010** or **IEEE 27001** for governance).
    - **Interoperability**: No standards for sensor data formats, communication protocols, or twin representation are specified.
  **Not in Document** for industry-specific standards (e.g., **IEC 62424** for process automation) or compliance frameworks (e.g., **NIST Digital Twin Reference Architecture**)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "
The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar employs **InfluxDB** for time-series data storage, which inherently includes basic security measures such as role-based access control (RBAC) and data encryption at rest (via TLS/SSL for data in transit). However, explicit documentation on **authentication systems** (e.g., OAuth2, JWT) or **threat mitigation strategies** (e.g., DDoS protection, intrusion detection) is not provided. The system relies on **ActiveMQ** for message brokering, which supports **TLS for secure communication** between components but lacks detailed disclosure of **fail-safe mechanisms** or **risk assessment frameworks**.

The **Air Quality Management** exemplar utilizes **Microsoft Azure tools**, which include built-in security features such as **Azure Active Directory (AAD) for authentication**, **role-based access control (RBAC)**, and **data encryption** (both at rest and in transit). The exemplar integrates **Raspberry Pi sensors** for real-time data collection, but no explicit mention of **privacy protection measures** (e.g., GDPR compliance, data anonymization) or **data sharing agreements** is provided. The **AutomationML-based digital twin** may imply standardized data exchange protocols, but **data ownership policies** or **consent management** are not documented.

The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** exemplar does not explicitly describe security or safety considerations in the provided context. No details on **cybersecurity protocols**, **access control mechanisms**, or **safety-critical system designs** (e.g., emergency stop protocols, redundancy checks) are mentioned in the documents.
"
]
